race.comment: The top two selections are the ones with the most upside and they are expected to fight it out. JEZEBEL JENNI (9) worked home steadily without threatening when fresh from a 250-day spell over this distance at Pakenham last time out. Lightly raced filly who will improve off that run and draws in a lot closer. THE ALPINA PENGUIN (13) raced handy and refused to lie down when a close fourth on debut over 1300m at this track recently. Likely improver who won't get too many better chances to break the ice. SAKER FALCON (5) has had a lot of chances but is very fit and worth considering on a quick back-up. JUST SWIFT (10) produced an eye-catcher first-up at Pakenham. Will get back again but watch for her late. JAWSOME ROB (4) has won a couple of recent jump-outs and looks ready to make a bright return to racing.
